tagged_types.name: NS_Function_Mapper
tagged_types.code: type NS_Function_Mapper is new Function_Mapper with private;

access_types.name: Function_Mapper_Access
access_types.code: type Function_Mapper_Access is access all Function_Mapper'Class;

subprograms.name: Get_Function
Remove_Namespace
subprograms.code:
procedure Remove_Namespace (Mapper : in out NS_Function_Mapper;
                            Prefix : in String)

subprograms.name: Set_Function
Set_Function_Mapper
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Function_Mapper (Mapper   : in out NS_Function_Mapper;
                               Delegate : in Function_Mapper_Access)

subprograms.name: Set_Namespace
